query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS governance_documents (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  documentType ENUM('GS1_STANDARD', 'GS1_GUIDELINE', 'GS1_WHITE_PAPER', 'EU_REGULATION', 'EU_DIRECTIVE', 'EU_IMPLEMENTING_ACT', 'EU_DELEGATED_ACT', 'TECHNICAL_SPECIFICATION', 'INDUSTRY_GUIDANCE', 'OTHER') NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('IDENTIFICATION', 'CAPTURE', 'SHARE', 'ESG_REPORTING', 'TRACEABILITY', 'DIGITAL_PRODUCT_PASSPORT', 'CIRCULAR_ECONOMY', 'DUE_DILIGENCE', 'PACKAGING', 'OTHER') NOT NULL,
  version VARCHAR(64),
  documentCode VARCHAR(128),
  publishedDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  effectiveDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  expiryDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  description TEXT,
  url VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  downloadUrl VARCHAR(512),
  language VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'en',
  status ENUM('DRAFT', 'PUBLISHED', 'SUPERSEDED', 'WITHDRAWN', 'ARCHIVED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PUBLISHED',
  supersededBy INT,
  isOfficial BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  lastVerifiedDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  verifiedBy VARCHAR(255),
  currencyDisclaimer TEXT,
  laneStatus ENUM('LANE_A', 'LANE_B', 'LANE_C') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'LANE_C',
  relatedRegulationIds JSON,
  relatedStandardIds JSON,
  tags JSON,
  keywords JSON,
  metadata JSON,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX documentType_idx (documentType),
  INDEX category_idx (category),
  INDEX status_idx (status),
  INDEX publishedDate_idx (publishedDate),
  INDEX documentCode_idx (documentCode)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS governance_documents (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  documentType ENUM('GS1_STANDARD', 'GS1_GUIDELINE', 'GS1_WHITE_PAPER', 'EU_REGULATION', 'EU_DIRECTIVE', 'EU_IMPLEMENTING_ACT', 'EU_DELEGATED_ACT', 'TECHNICAL_SPECIFICATION', 'INDUSTRY_GUIDANCE', 'OTHER') NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('IDENTIFICATION', 'CAPTURE', 'SHARE', 'ESG_REPORTING', 'TRACEABILITY', 'DIGITAL_PRODUCT_PASSPORT', 'CIRCULAR_ECONOMY', 'DUE_DILIGENCE', 'PACKAGING', 'OTHER') NOT NULL,
  version VARCHAR(64),
  documentCode VARCHAR(128),
  publishedDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  effectiveDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  expiryDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  description TEXT,
  url VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  downloadUrl VARCHAR(512),
  language VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'en',
  status ENUM('DRAFT', 'PUBLISHED', 'SUPERSEDED', 'WITHDRAWN', 'ARCHIVED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PUBLISHED',
  supersededBy INT,
  isOfficial BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  lastVerifiedDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  verifiedBy VARCHAR(255),
  currencyDisclaimer TEXT,
  laneStatus ENUM('LANE_A', 'LANE_B', 'LANE_C') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'LANE_C',
  relatedRegulationIds JSON,
  relatedStandardIds JSON,
  tags JSON,
  keywords JSON,
  metadata JSON,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX documentType_idx (documentType),
  INDEX category_idx (category),
  INDEX status_idx (status),
  INDEX publishedDate_idx (publishedDate),
  INDEX documentCode_idx (documentCode)
)
